name: team-forge
description: Meta-extension for Claude Code that forges project-specific multi-agent setups from a 5-phase human-in-the-loop lifecycle (brainstorm → plan → design → forge → teardown). Two archetypes: agent-team (persistent roster on the agent-teams primitive, with rehydrate) and workflow (lead-driven task/gate loop for coding-heavy sequential or fan-out work). Forges agents, skills, a launcher, and an observability hub into the target project.
